---
title: "Module 2 Code Tutorial"
subtitle: "P-values, Permutation Inference, and the Hidden Assumptions of Random Assignment"
---

<!--
  SETUP INSTRUCTIONS
  ==================
  1. Open "Module 2- Hypothesis Testing/Module 2 Code Tutorials.qmd"
  2. Copy everything AFTER the closing --- of the YAML block (i.e., from the ```{r setup chunk onward)
  3. Paste it below this comment block
  4. Also copy the figs/ folder from "Module 2- Hypothesis Testing/figs/" into this folder (module-2/figs/)
     and copy fig_sensitivity_regression.png into module-2/ as well

  The YAML above replaces the original --- block entirely.
  Do NOT copy the original title/format/execute YAML — it is already handled by _quarto.yml.
-->
